description: Every teen hurricane wants to be a rockstar - the very essence of this shoe from enroute's Teen collection. Styled with minimalistic overlays and sleek patterning, this shoe is as sturdy as it is trendy!UpperFabric upper with nubuck overlaysCentral lace upsPadded tongueMesh padded innerOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardRemovable socklinerMidsoleTough rubber midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with a curved midfoot and textured terraced lugsShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
